textByHashes.f72a26db476cbd21d40c466a47398825aa9a211d: Please... Nobody's looking into anything. Just leave us.
textByHashes.7cb54578557bdedc868fd9d2c44fc1bec9d4df75: What do you need from us, ?
textByHashes.f17cf03c5a73ebc3813caca1d533eccd0b0244d9: Nothing really. The only thing that was a bit odd was the ents...
textByHashes.ef6445d08eafad976d2df1baf7217ab04027ccb1: Yes. Their normal path takes them right past our house, but the night the boys disappeared, they took a different route. It's like they were avoiding something...
textByHashes.22ab37c6aeb36a4ac398880d7f51fac21e41c7ef: Yes, I saw that, but I thought it was from the ents. Do you think something else left it?
textByHashes.a1b30d9c4640003478232e340d7b995603abcda4: What direction was this trail going?
textByHashes.c8d7bd2ac6b0bac5f3ae828323436fb6debc239f: Thank you for helping us. No one else seems to care...
textByHashes.e90d914389b40cc7ee838ea567c5f4d13c2cbb6c: Probably using the survival skills I taught them! That's my boys!
textByHashes.117ae8b68bcfa7577b809dd0ad0ac7d3ae7bbe43: You think they were taken by something?
textByHashes.d7135226466d671387f4fa2aa560bc06843e82fd: In the meantime, you should go see Ariadna, the guard captain. People can't ignore this now. If something did take our boys, she needs to know about it. You'll find her by the main entrance into town.
textByHashes.88733d49e86eb1d79e0d55d4178d5922a77169b7: If it's not too much trouble, that would mean a lot to us.
textByHashes.ff3d9101af660120c1debd75af95ec17c2dc80b1: Yes, but do be patient with them. They still have quite a bit of recovering to do.
textByHashes.11813ef718159f6a211f64390dac343d27fb2a0f: They're just upstairs, but do be patient with them. They still have quite a bit of recovering to do.
textByHashes.07c6b3d852a65eedd4d2f19b3de3c6276eb81dc1: Antos is up there? You'd better go and find him, iknami!
textByHashes.8918d77f4a4829bac899a66a050f9a895e531262: Tetamo! You are too humble, friend. Without you, our boys would be dead. What you did means everything to us.
textByHashes.da1b27ddf8b934fbd10dc4ab93ab7e1833a8db17: I hope they come home soon...
